view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for queue ETA signal support to create temporary unavailability windows is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for queue ETA signal support to create temporary unavailability windows is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided demonstrates that the system successfully creates a temporary unavailability window based on the queue's ETA signal. Specifically, the linked use case describes a scenario where the system marks a time slot as unavailable when the queue predicts a barber's busy schedule, which aligns with the requirement. Additionally, the prior step evidence confirms that the necessary actions to create and manage these unavailability windows were executed successfully.
